name: SIEM Coverage — Splunk ES, Microsoft Sentinel, Elastic Security
description: ATT&CK technique coverage provided by Splunk Enterprise Security, Microsoft Sentinel, and Elastic Security SIEM through log correlation, behavioral detection rules, and UEBA analytics.

techniques.comment: Email alert correlation across SIEM platforms
Web log detection for exploit attempts
PowerShell behavioral detection rules
Windows Command Shell execution detection
JavaScript execution detection
Malicious file execution detection
Scheduled task creation detection
Registry Run Keys modification detection
Windows Service creation/modification detection
UAC bypass attempt detection
Account manipulation detection via UEBA and audit logs
Account creation event detection and alerting
Security tool disable/modify detection
Firewall disable/modify detection
LSASS memory access detection — Mimikatz signatures
NTDS DC sync detection via replication event correlation
Brute force lockout correlation and threshold alerting
Valid account anomaly detection via UEBA baselines
Anomalous RDP access alert and geo-correlation
SMB lateral movement detection via event correlation
Pass-the-Hash detection via event log correlation
Pass-the-Ticket Kerberos anomaly detection
DLP log correlation for alternate protocol exfiltration
Remote email collection detection via mail audit logs
C2 beacon detection via application layer protocol analytics

Ransomware behavioral detection — mass file encryption patterns
